rules.//: ── Public message board: open writes, schema-validated ──

$msg..write: newData.child('text').isString() && newData.child('text').val().length <= 500 && newData.child('text').val().length > 0 && newData.child('timestamp').val() <= now && (!data.exists() || newData.child('text').val() === data.child('text').val())

rules.//content: ── Site content: anyone can READ; only the Vercel admin-write API (using the Firebase Admin SDK) can WRITE. The Admin SDK bypasses these rules, so we deny client writes entirely. ──
